title: Expressões do Dia a Dia
description: 30 expressões de conversação que os nativos usam o tempo todo.

cards.example: Hey Mike, what's up?
Never mind, I found my keys.

cards.back: Você que sabe / A decisão é sua
cards.example: We can eat out or cook at home — it's up to you.
I can't go to the concert; I'm broke this month.
Hang on, I'll be right there.
By the way, did you call your mom?
Take your time, we're not in a hurry.
Now that you explained it, it makes sense.
No way! You won the lottery?
I have no idea where she went.
Carlos! Long time no see! How have you been?
You wash, I dry — it's a deal.
Don't worry, I'm on my way.
How's the new job? So far, so good.
You're kidding! They canceled the flight?

cards.back: Não é grande coisa / Não tem problema
cards.example: Don't apologize, it's not a big deal.
There's coffee in the kitchen — help yourself.
I know I shouldn't laugh, but I can't help it.
The course is expensive, but it's worth it.
Guess what? I got the job!
Stop doing that — I mean it.
Come in, make yourself at home.

cards.back: Me fugiu da cabeça / Esqueci completamente
cards.example: Sorry I didn't call — it totally slipped my mind.
He finally apologized. Better late than never.
You didn't go to the party? How come?
He arrived late again — that's the last straw.

cards.back: Falando no diabo... (quando a pessoa aparece)
cards.example: Speak of the devil — we were just talking about you!

cards.back: Estou dentro / Estou fora (topar ou não)
cards.example: Road trip this weekend? I'm in!
Lunch at noon? Sounds good.

cards.back: Calma / Pega leve; também usado como despedida
cards.example: Take it easy, we still have plenty of time.
